src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Add OpenAPI definition annotation to document the API title, version, and contact information.
Add Slf4j logging annotation to enable logger injection in the application class.
Inject UserService, RoleRepository, FlightRepository, and DataGenService to enable data initialization logic.
Add a PostConstruct method to initialize default roles, users, and flight data if the database is empty.
Set the default JVM timezone to UTC during application startup to ensure consistent date handling.
Create default ADMIN and AGENT roles in the database if they do not already exist.
Create default admin and agent user accounts with specific credentials if they do not already exist.
Generate and insert default flight data using DataGenService if the flight repository is empty.
Configure WebSecurity to ignore static resource paths to improve performance and bypass security filters for assets.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.human_impl: Added @Override configure(WebSecurity web) method with ignoring().antMatchers(...)

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Add the flights list page to the list of publicly accessible routes.
Enable HTTP Basic authentication as an additional authentication mechanism.
Add Slf4j logging annotation and log statements for debugging and audit trails.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.human_impl: @Slf4j ... log.info("About to open the New Airport page");

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Add Lombok val import for local variable type inference.
Add MultipartFile import to support file upload operations.
Add IOException import to handle file I/O errors.
Add static import for Objects.requireNonNull for null safety checks.
Extract model attribute names into static final constants for consistency.
Remove unused FlightService and PassengerService dependencies as their controllers are removed.
Add AircraftRestController dependency to delegate CSV import logic.
Add GET endpoint to display the edit form for an existing airport.
Add POST endpoint to process and save airport edits.
Add GET endpoint to display the edit form for an existing aircraft.
Add POST endpoint to process and save aircraft edits.
Add POST endpoint to handle CSV file uploads for importing aircraft data.
Remove all controller methods related to Flight management (new, edit, delete, search, book).
Remove all controller methods related to Passenger management (booking, verification, cancellation).
Replace hardcoded model attribute strings with defined constants.
Insert log.info calls at the entry of various controller methods for tracing.
Refactor delete aircraft method to reuse the list display method.
Add humorous logging statements to login endpoints.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Added a single-argument constructor to EntityNotFoundException to allow instantiation with just a message string.
Add Jackson annotations to handle object identity and managed references for JSON serialization.
Add Bean Validation constraints to enforce data integrity on fields.
Explicitly specify IDENTITY generation strategy for the primary key.
Implement Comparable interface to define natural ordering for Aircraft entities.
Remove implementation of custom IdedEntity interface in favor of direct ID handling.
Initialize the flights list by default using Lombok's @Builder.Default.
Ensure constructors initialize the flights list to prevent null pointer exceptions.
Override toString to provide a detailed string representation including flight numbers.
Add a describe method for a concise string representation excluding the flights list.
Implement compareTo logic to sort aircraft by model, falling back to ID.
Add Jackson annotations to handle circular references and identity resolution for the Airport entity.
Mark the flights collection as a managed reference to prevent infinite recursion during JSON serialization.
Implement the Comparable interface to allow natural sorting of Airport objects.
Ensure the flights list is initialized by default when using the Lombok builder.
Explicitly define the ID generation strategy as IDENTITY for clarity and compatibility.
Enforce uniqueness on the airportCode column at the database schema level.
Add size validation constraints to string fields to limit input length.
Provide a detailed string representation of the Airport entity including flight numbers.
Add a helper method to describe the airport without including the flights collection.
Implement comparison logic to sort airports by name, falling back to ID if names are null.
Remove the custom IdedEntity interface as the getId method is no longer required or implemented.
Replace manual getters, setters, constructors, and toString with Lombok annotations to reduce boilerplate.
Configure Jackson to handle bidirectional relationships and prevent infinite recursion during serialization.
Annotate entity relationships with Jackson back/managed references to control serialization direction.
Add Bean Validation annotations to enforce data integrity rules on fields.
Add a new 'gate' field to the Flight entity to store gate information.
Add a new 'status' field to the Flight entity to store flight status.
Implement Comparable interface to allow natural sorting of Flight objects by flight number.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Use the Java 17 List.toList() method in toString for cleaner collection conversion.
Add a custom describe method that returns a string representation excluding the passengers list.
Explicitly specify IDENTITY generation strategy for the primary key.
Replace manual getters, setters, constructors, and toString with Lombok annotations to reduce boilerplate.
Add size limits and email validation to passenger fields to ensure data integrity.
Prevent infinite recursion during JSON serialization of the bidirectional relationship with Flight.
Handle circular references in JSON by using object identity based on passport number.
Explicitly define the ID generation strategy for the entity primary key.
Added Lombok annotations to replace boilerplate getter and setter methods.
Removed explicit getter and setter methods now handled by Lombok.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.human_impl: Deleted getId, setId, getName, setName, getUsers, setUsers methods.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Added a custom toString method for better debugging output.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Added import for java.util.stream.Collectors to support the new toString implementation.
Changed JPA ID generation strategy from AUTO to IDENTITY.
Standardized spacing in JPA annotations for code style consistency.
Replace manual boilerplate getters, setters, and constructors with Lombok annotations to reduce code verbosity.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Initialize the roles list to an empty ArrayList by default to prevent NullPointerExceptions when accessing roles on a new or unpopulated entity.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Explicitly set the fetch type for the roles relationship to EAGER to ensure roles are loaded immediately with the user.
Enforce a maximum length on the last name field to prevent excessive data entry and align with database schema constraints.
